state_snapshot.overall_goal: Integrate openNURBS 8.x into Alice Viewer 2 for DOD-optimized .3dm geometry translation (meshes, curves, points) and stabilize cross-platform CI/CD.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **Build System**: STRICTLY Ninja/LLVM pipeline; no MSVC `cl.exe`. - **Toolchain**: `clang-cl.exe` (C/CXX) and `lld-link.exe` with `-std:c++17` and Static Runtime (`/MT`). - **VCPKG**: Manifest mode with `x64-windows-static` triplet. `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS` must target the `ports/` subdirectory for manifest resolution. - **Performance**: Data-Oriented Design (DOD); Branchless logic; Zero heap allocations in hot loops; Eliminate `virtual` function calls. - **Memory**: Use `Alice::LinearArena` for all runtime logic (100MB initialized in test). - **Interaction**: Orbit (`ALT+LMB`), Pan (`MMB`), Zoom (`ALT+RMB`). Respect `ImGui::GetIO().WantCaptureMouse`. - **Graphics**: OpenGL 400 Core; `GL_RGBA16F` G-Buffers; Deep Charcoal (`#2D2D2D`) geometry; Background `0.9`. - **CI/CD**: Windows runners MUST install Ninja via Chocolatey; Linux via `ninja-build clang lld`. - **Formatting**: STRICT Allman style.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **VCPKG Registry Fix**: Converted `vcpkg-overlay-ports` from a gitlink (submodule) to a standard directory to fix GitHub Actions checkout. - **Manifest Mode Pathing**: `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS` in `CMakeLists.txt` must point to the `ports/` subdirectory (e.g., `${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/vcpkg-overlay-ports/ports`) for manifest mode to correctly discover the `opennurbs` port. - **Linker Requirements**: Static `opennurbs` on Windows requires `shlwapi.lib` and `zlib.lib`. - **Frontend Conflict**: Avoid "mixed frontend variants" error by explicitly setting both `CMAKE_C_COMPILER` and `CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER` to `clang-cl.exe`.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `include/RhinoIO.h`: Single-header implementation with DOD translation for meshes, points, and curves. - `src/sketch.cpp`: Configured to initialize `Alice::g_Arena`, call `ON::Begin()`/`ON::End()`, and route to `Alice::RhinoIO_UnitTest()`. - `CMakeLists.txt`: Configured with corrected `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS`, `VCPKG_TARGET_TRIPLET`, and explicit `clang-cl` compiler paths. - `vcpkg-overlay-ports/`: Converted to standard directory and tracked in Git.
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - CWD: `C:\Users\shajay.b\Documents\REPOS\alice-viewer - openNurbs` - COMPILER: `C:/Program Files/LLVM/bin/clang-cl.exe` - NINJA: `C:\Users\shajay.b\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\Ninja-build.Ninja_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\ninja.exe` - BUILD: `./build/` directory cleanly regenerated and verified (0 errors).
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - Destroyed inner Git repository in `vcpkg-overlay-ports` and fixed Git index (removed gitlink). - Corrected `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS` path in `CMakeLists.txt` for manifest mode. - Successfully verified local build with Ninja/LLVM/vcpkg. - Performed clean regeneration of the build environment for developer handoff. - Generated latest state snapshot.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Setup vcpkg overlay ports for openNURBS 8.x. 2. [DONE] Implement single-header `RhinoIO.h` with `ONX_Model` translation. 3. [DONE] Repair CI/CD pipeline (Gitlink conversion and overlay pathing). 4. [DONE] Add support for Curve and Point translation. 5. [DONE] Execute SOP steps 7-9 (Clean build and handoff). 6. [IN PROGRESS] Implement GL-ready buffer generation for extracted geometry. 7. [TODO] Add support for adaptive NURBS curve approximation.
